title: Replacement of mutilated, destroyed, or lost bonds
doc_html:
§870.  Replacement of mutilated, destroyed, or lost bonds

The governing authority of any parish may provide for the replacement of any bond which is mutilated, destroyed, or lost.
doc_text:
§870.  Replacement of mutilated, destroyed, or lost bonds
The governing authority of any parish may provide for the replacement of any bond which is mutilated, destroyed, or lost.
